features.name: buffer module with malformed port declaration
features.description: Code should include a BUFZ (buffer) module where a port declaration contains malformed syntax with an extra dot character (e.g., 'output wire q,.' instead of proper comma-separated ports)

features.name: trailing inline comment before endmodule
features.description: Code should include a module with a trailing comment syntax (// comment) placed between the module body and the endmodule keyword, which can confuse parsers handling malformed constructs
